properties.text:
# Three-Act Feature
5 parallel scene pipelines · 8n+1 frame math
Provide starter images for all 5 scenes + character reference.

info.name: FrameWeaver Three-Act Feature
info.author: FrameWeaver
info.description: 5-scene parallel narrative film with dramatic arc structure. All 5 scenes generate in a single execution.

inputs.base_style: cinematic, high quality, film grain, anamorphic lens, 35mm stock, coherent character identity, stable wardrobe, detailed motion
inputs.base_negative: blurry, low quality, warped anatomy, flicker, inconsistent identity, static shot, watermark
inputs.scene_1: Character enters a dimly lit room, establishing the environment and mood.

inputs.style_description: cinematic film look, high contrast, desaturated warm tones, anamorphic flares, film grain
inputs.identity_description: Same character across all scenes: consistent face, clothing, body proportions, movement patterns.

inputs.text: blurry, low quality, still frame, flicker, inconsistent character, watermark, overlay

inputs.change: Change only the environment and action needed for scene 2.
